childhood.familyBackground: Family in manufacturing and electronics. Exposed to business in Zhejiang entrepreneurial culture.
childhood.familyBackgroundKo: 제조 및 전자 가족. 저장성 기업가 문화에 노출
childhood.earlyLife: Grew up during China's economic opening. Witnessed tech company rise. Inspired by entrepreneurial environment.
childhood.earlyLifeKo: 중국 경제 개방 중 성장. 기술 회사 부상 목격. 기업가 환경에 영감

careerTimeline.event: Became world's largest consumer drone manufacturer
careerTimeline.eventKo: 세계 최대 소비자 드론 제조업체가 됨

careerTimeline.event: Expanded into aerial imaging and industrial applications
careerTimeline.eventKo: 항공 이미징 및 산업 응용으로 확장

failures.description: Initial drone models faced quality and safety concerns
failures.descriptionKo: 초기 드론 모델이 품질 및 안전 문제 직면

quotes.text: Technology should be accessible to everyone

recommended.title: The Lean Startup
recommended.author: Eric Ries
recommended.note: Influences business strategy and innovation approach
recommended.noteKo: 비즈니스 전략 및 혁신 접근에 영향

personalTraits.knownFor: Building world's leading drone company from Hangzhou
personalTraits.knownForKo: 항저우에서 세계 선도 드론 회사 구축
personalTraits.philanthropy: Supports technology education and startup ecosystems
personalTraits.philanthropyKo: 기술 교육 및 스타트업 생태계를 지원
